DUPR pathway 2.0–5.0

Level 2.5: Consistency Builder

Reduce easy misses and start choosing safer targets.

Level 2.5

2.0
2.5
3.0
3.5
4.0
4.5
5.0

What to focus on

  • Make more returns deep
  • Dink without popping the ball up
  • Move with your partner instead of chasing alone
  • Recognise when to reset instead of swinging harder

Core skills

Deep returnsBasic dinksEarly split stepSimple target selection

Drills to run

  • Deep return ladder
  • 100 soft dinks with a partner
  • Serve-return-plus-one pattern
  • Transition-zone stop drill

Best paddle profile

Control or all-court paddle with enough forgiveness to protect consistency.

Try the DUPR self-check →Upload a highlightNext level: 3.0
